Fixes the selected playlist icon square.

### Fixed
- The **selected playlist icon** is coloured instead of turning into a solid square — the fill now targets only the glyph path, skipping the Material icons' full-size `fill="none"` bounding box (which was filling into a square).

### Important — clear the skin cache
MediaMonkey caches compiled skins. Delete `%APPDATA%\MediaMonkey5\precompiledLess_Flat Monkey Dark_Desktop.css`, then restart MediaMonkey.
